006496_test.text1: start with left arm down and right in the front. tap twice with it
006496_test.text2: raise your hand a little earlier
006496_test.text4: keep the palm facing you and move it to the right
006496_test.text5: raise arm sooner and a bit higher
006496_test.text6: raise arm sooner and lower it slower

006955_test.captions: the person is placing things in order.
006955_test.captiont: a person has both arms up to their sides and brings them down. takes right arm and make a cross sign in front of them.
006955_test.text1: make the motion slightly slower. make a single sweeping arm motion instead of tapping
006955_test.text2: don't bend the elbow and move the right hand from left to right and then up and down
006955_test.text3: start by reaching forward with right arm. then do the previous motion but with both arms synchronized
006955_test.text5: start with arms already down, do the entire action with your left hand instead of right
006955_test.text6: at the end add an extra circular motion with your arm

007193_test.captions: a person picks something up with both hands, turns it, and very carefully places it onto something.
007193_test.captiont: person opens drawer then puts something in it
007193_test.text2: keep the hand at the same level as the shoulder
007193_test.text3: raise both arms slightly higher, to chest level, when turning right
007193_test.text4: slightly later move left arm up
007193_test.text5: don't move left arm, lean more right
007193_test.text6: delay unfolding left arm to the left

006775_test.captions: person raises right arms and moves arm around circular before placing down and raising both arms to shoulder height
006775_test.captiont: a man brings his hands down to his sides, then uses his left hand to tap something in the air in front of him, before bringing his arm back down to his side.
006775_test.text1: reduce  up and down motion of the left arm slightly
006775_test.text3: keep left arm in front of body and make a small left and right motion
006775_test.text4: move the left hand from right to left and back instead of up and down
006775_test.text5: do a wider waving motion with left arm
006775_test.text6: start moving arm more to the left, up and down

007230_test.captions: person holds something in their hands and tilts that to the right then tilts it back to normal.
007230_test.captiont: a person lifts something with two hands, then tilts one side of it upwards
007230_test.text1: start by being in the final position
007230_test.text3: don't turn body and extend arm to the right
007230_test.text4: keep left hand in the same position, extend right arm against chest at an angle
007230_test.text5: raise left arm to chest level when turning right
007230_test.text6: don't move hand, keep it fixed on the hip. tilt head slightly right

006546_test.captions: a person stretches arms and does arm rolls
006546_test.captiont: a man moves arms out at his side and in front of him in a swimming motion.
006546_test.text2: do a diagonal line instead of a circle
006546_test.text3: do the same but with the opposite arm in front
006546_test.text5: do a diagonal line instead of a circle
006546_test.text6: move the arms in a circle in the forward direction not in the left and right direction

005917_test.captions: a person sits down on a chair.
005917_test.captiont: a person reaches in front, then to the side and makes circle motions with each hand.
005917_test.text1: stand up and do wiping motions with right hand
005917_test.text2: do a pot-stiring motion with right arm instead of keeping it still
005917_test.text3: turn slightly to the right and don't cross legs
005917_test.text4: don't look around, don't get up
005917_test.text5: don't lean back, spread legs a bit wider
005917_test.text6: don't look to the left and keep your legs closer together

007528_test.captiont: person raises arms down and move them left pauses for a few moments then returns to original position
007528_test.text1: turn to the right slightly later
007528_test.text3: turn to the right slightly later
007528_test.text5: turn a bit slower, lean more on left leg

007186_test.captions: a person spins their arms around in a circular motion before switching them into an extended stretching motion.
007186_test.captiont: this person has both arms extended out to his sides and moves them is small circles.
007186_test.text1: don't clap hands. rotate both wrists
007186_test.text3: rotate arms in the other direction
007186_test.text4: after the first rotation, keep the arms at the shoulder level and rotate only the wrists
007186_test.text6: extend the arms forward as if getting ready to do a push-up, then bring them down

006421_test.captions: a person wiggles their shoulders from side to side with their arms by their side
006421_test.captiont: person is slightly squatting and does a t-pose
006421_test.text2: start by tilting head back instead of to the side
006421_test.text3: look more towards the left side
006421_test.text4: look straight ahead instead of down

007346_test.captions: a person lifts a box from the left side and puts it on the right side
007346_test.captiont: person is moving something to the side.
007346_test.text3: raise left hand to the chest level when turning right
007346_test.text5: dont move the left hand and keep the body facing center

007473_test.captions: the person is pushed to the right and seems to try to keep their balance.
007473_test.captiont: a person swaying from side to side.
007473_test.text1: shift  body forward and do not move arms
007473_test.text3: keep legs closer together and turn body slightly to the right
007473_test.text4: don't rotate and keep the right hand more straight and pointing downwards
007473_test.text6: don't rotate the hips and stay in place

007795_test.captions: a person moves their right arm in around in front of them as if completing a task.
007795_test.captiont: a person stretches then begins moving objects on a shelf in front of them.
007795_test.text3: do a clockwise circle with the right hand instead
007795_test.text4: don't raise the right arm at the end
007795_test.text5: move the hand up and down instead of left and right
007795_test.text6: do a rightward and then a forward motion with the right arm

006326_test.captions: the person is pouring some thing from a bottle.
006326_test.captiont: a person with their arms out to the side moves their arm down, makes a cross shape in front of them, then waves their hand horizontally
006326_test.text1: move right hand up & forward instead of keeping it down
006326_test.text2: raise the right hand a little more
006326_test.text3: don't move right arm up at the end
006326_test.text4: raise right arm faster and lower it down in the end
006326_test.text5: start by having right arm up already
006326_test.text6: instead of swiping right hand in front, put it down and then raise it up again

006707_test.captions: person raises arms forward, brings them out to the side, bends the elbows in, brings the arms back down, and then brings them out to the side again
006707_test.captiont: a man has his arms apart, then brings his hands to touch in front of his chest. he brings his arms down to his sides for a moment, then stretches them back out at shoulder-height.
006707_test.text1: don't reach back with arms, start raising them slightly sooner
006707_test.text2: raise both arms a bit later
006707_test.text3: start with arms raised, lower them sooner
006707_test.text5: start with arms down and raise them up

005933_test.captions: this person appears to cough in his right hand then takes a drink of something.
005933_test.captiont: a person swaying from side to side
005933_test.text1: straighten up, move weight from one leg to another
005933_test.text3: shift weight slightly to the left
005933_test.text4: lean body slightly to the right
005933_test.text6: don't raise head, lean body slightly forward

006730_test.captions: a man's arms are outstretched at shoulder-width, and begins bending his elbows like he's flexing. then his arms go back out straight again at shoulder level.
006730_test.captiont: a person flexes both arms a few times, lowers them and puts them straight out.
006730_test.text2: lower arms later, keep them down afterwards
006730_test.text3: raise arms sooner, keep them up longer

007559_test.captions: a figure standing still and waving their arms like they were rummaging through an old closet.
007559_test.captiont: a person has both arms up to their sides and brings them down. takes right arm and make a cross sign in front of them.
007559_test.text1: swipe right hand from left to right instead of swimming motion
007559_test.text2: raise the right hand instead of keeping it on the sides
007559_test.text3: raise the right hand higher at the end
007559_test.text4: raise right arm to the left shoulder level
007559_test.text5: at the end raise right forearm to the left shoulder level

005942_test.captions: person makes motions like hit bongos.
005942_test.captiont: a person shrugs then drops their arms, then makes several small fast motions with both arms and finally stretches their right arm out to the side.
005942_test.text1: move arms in a less exaggerated way
005942_test.text2: do the movement in the opposite side
005942_test.text3: raise the arm higher when doing the drinking motion
005942_test.text4: lower the left hand and do a stop gesture with the right hand
005942_test.text5: move the hands up and down alternatively instead of keeping them constant
005942_test.text6: move the hands up and down without touching each other

006259_test.captions: a person grabs something from the left with his right hand, waves his right hand in the air, then puts the item back
006259_test.captiont: person bending down and making odd circular movements
006259_test.text1: spread  arms out more,  sway side to side, bending from waist
006259_test.text3: keep the right hand lower and bend a bit more
006259_test.text4: don't bend so much, face a bit towards the right and extend right arm more
006259_test.text5: do the motion higher, on shoulder level
006259_test.text6: lean up a bit more, don't reach as far with right arm

006980_test.captions: a person has both their arms outstretched and their arms pointing straight out on each side. the person then relaxes their arms and go back to their original pose. the person does this twice.
006980_test.captiont: a person raised the both hands
006980_test.text3: start by having arms straightened and then bend them in the elbows
006980_test.text4: start with arms raised sideways and bring them down, not the other way around

006848_test.captions: a person holds both arms out to his sides, lowers them, lifts his left arm up in front of his face and pushes forward, drags to the left pushes forward again, drags to the lefts and pushes forward again.
006848_test.captiont: the man is moving his arms
006848_test.text1: tap left and right again at the end
006848_test.text2: do the motion with the other arm
006848_test.text3: raise forearm faster, at the end lower it to your side
006848_test.text5: raise left arm sooner, don't raise right arm

005983_test.captions: a man raises his right hand to his mouth then lowers it and then raises it back and then lowers it once again.
005983_test.captiont: standing and swaying around not much movement
005983_test.text1: sway body from left to right, instead of standing still
005983_test.text2: don't look back, keep looking in the direction of the movement
005983_test.text4: don't lean to the left as much, keep looking down at the end
005983_test.text5: don't shift weight onto left leg

006234_test.captions: a person bends down and picks up something with their left hand then washing it with their right and gently sets it back down.
006234_test.captiont: a person leans over to pick something up with his right hand then makes a jerking motion with his right hand, puts something down using his right hand.
006234_test.text1: keep your arm to your side and the hand below the elbow
006234_test.text4: bring left hand closer to hips
006234_test.text5: lower left arm slightly, don't move it so much
006234_test.text6: do a cutting action with the right hand and dont move the left hand

007417_test.captions: a person reaches for something then moves it to the right/
007417_test.captiont: a person picks something up, tilts it, then lowers it

006202_test.captions: a person picks something up, waives it in the air and puts it back.
006202_test.captiont: the person is taking a shower.
006202_test.text1: keep left arm closer to hips
006202_test.text3: do the same hand motion but start with your left arm already extended
006202_test.text5: turn slightly more left, hold left hand lower

006399_test.captions: the person held his arms out wide and put them down to his side while he was sitting.
006399_test.captiont: person stands feet shoulder length apart then raises arms shoulder level once
006399_test.text1: look straight, at the end extend arms to the sides up
006399_test.text2: don't move the arms at all and keep them down
006399_test.text5: start with arms down, bring them up in the end

007260_test.captions: a person picks something up and pours it out then sets it down again.
007260_test.captiont: a person grabbed something and put it somehwere
007260_test.text2: keep looking down and continue the motion
007260_test.text3: shift body slightly to the right
007260_test.text5: shift body slightly to the right, keep standing in the same spot
007260_test.text6: shift body slightly to the right

006721_test.captions: a person standing still moves left hand forward , backward to the side and down.
006721_test.captiont: the man is waving to the left
006721_test.text3: don't lift the left hand at the end
006721_test.text4: move left arm a bit earlier
006721_test.text5: start with arm up and then lower it
006721_test.text6: raise the left arm a bit later

007001_test.captions: the person points with their right hand and then with their left hand
007001_test.captiont: a person is making a circular motion with his left hand then pushes people away.
007001_test.text1: keep your left hand against your side
007001_test.text3: start by extending left arm forward, then do the previous motion
007001_test.text4: don't move the left hand at all and keep it fixed
007001_test.text5: do not move hand to the right, instead move it up and down
007001_test.text6: raise left arm just a little bit and move it left to right

006402_test.captions: a person squats with knees bent outward and both arms raised out to the sides. they then lower both arms, resting them on their knees.
006402_test.captiont: the woman skips happily backwards towards her friend.
006402_test.text1: look straight and drop arms faster
006402_test.text2: raise right arm slightly higher and hold both arms out to the side at the end
006402_test.text3: keep arms raised for a little longer
006402_test.text5: lower arms faster, raise them to shoulder height

007413_test.captions: the person is grabbing something to the right of them and placing it in front of them
007413_test.captiont: a person grabbed something and put it somewhere
007413_test.text3: don't turn, make a step forward with the left leg

007679_test.captions: a man raises his arms to shoulder height, praising jesus's sacrifice.
007679_test.captiont: a person performing two t poses
007679_test.text1: lower arms sooner, turn head from left-down to the right
007679_test.text3: don't tilt head, don't bend elbows
007679_test.text6: do it slower, put hands down faster, keep head straight

006787_test.captions: a man brings his arms down to his side, a man brings his hands back up and meets the together at his chest, a man drops his arms back down to his side.
006787_test.captiont: the person was facing forward and put his arms down by his side.
006787_test.text1: spread your arms wider when performing the movement
006787_test.text4: start with arms spread to the sides
006787_test.text5: do a milling motion with forearms instead of just raising and lowering arms
006787_test.text6: keep the hands parallel to each other and in front of the body at the end

005934_test.captions: a person puts his arms out to his side and spins in circles
005934_test.captiont: a person spins around with his hands raised and then switches the spinning direction.
005934_test.text1: spin in a wider circle counterclockwise instead of at one place
005934_test.text3: do the rotation in the opposite direction
005934_test.text4: keep looking in the same direction
005934_test.text5: do it clockwise and keep the legs closer together
005934_test.text6: take a full turn to the left first

006968_test.captions: the person standing with his arms out wide and then calls them into chest.
006968_test.captiont: this person bends at the knees to pick up something.
006968_test.text1: hold arms lower, reach further forward
006968_test.text3: move arms closer to the hips
006968_test.text5: keep both arms raised for a moment before bringing them down

006181_test.captions: a person picks up a cloth with the right hand, i item with the left, then wipes it.
006181_test.captiont: a person moves their right arm in a jerky motion.
006181_test.text1: don't take a step out to the side at the end
006181_test.text2: do the motion on a flat horizontal plane instead
006181_test.text3: do a half step to the left before starting
006181_test.text5: make a step forward with the same leg
006181_test.text6: don't step forward, stay in place

006013_test.captions: a person throws something with their right hand
006013_test.captiont: he is throwing and playing catch
006013_test.text1: catch the ball first before throwing it
006013_test.text3: instead of throwing a ball swing to the side twice
006013_test.text4: raise the left hand instead of right hand
006013_test.text5: do the arm motion a bit slower and lower, and extend it more forward
006013_test.text6: don't move the left hand and keep the right hand down
